title: Consolidation of hearings
doc_html:
Art. 762.  Consolidation of hearings

The hearing on the petition to declare the family in need of services may be consolidated with a hearing on a petition to declare a child delinquent or a petition to declare a child in need of care.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §7.
